title: Conflict Diagnosis and Semantic Resolution · Spiral Review
summary: Resolve an integration conflict by reconstructing both intents and verifying behavior rather than deleting markers until Git accepts the file. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a conflict reproduction, resolution, and regression record after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Inspect unmerged index stages, ours/theirs/base terminology, paths, and operation context before editing.
Read conflict markers and diff views while obtaining surrounding base and commit intent.
Construct a new result from requirements, tests, and both histories rather than treating resolution as text selection.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# git-basics cumulative repository evidence notebook
# Git operations change only disposable simulated repository state.
# Inspect status, diffs, graph, refs, and recovery before every mutation.

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
review case — Merge conflict in policy.txt has base limit=2, main limit=5, and repair limit=6 plus retry tests. Inspect index stages, reconstruct intent, create a semantic result, and verify before continue.

Inspect the Rerere Regression trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for record or reuse conflict resolutions only after verifying context, tests, and changed-case behavior.

content.text: For Rerere Regression, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: Name the Rerere Regression precondition or invariant that the review case must preserve.

Trace this concrete case before choosing: Merge conflict in policy.txt has base limit=2, main limit=5, and repair limit=6 plus retry tests. Inspect index stages, reconstruct intent, create a semantic result, and verify before continue.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: rerere can safely accept every repeated textual resolution without review.

stimulus.title: Rerere Regression case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Merge conflict in policy.txt has base limit=2, main limit=5, and repair limit=6 plus retry tests. Inspect index stages, reconstruct intent, create a semantic result, and verify before continue.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: rerere can safely accept every repeated textual resolution without review.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Record or reuse conflict resolutions only after verifying context, tests, and changed-case behavior. Artifact under review: a conflict reproduction, resolution, and regression record.

options.text: Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Rerere Regression, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.

steps.title: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle
steps.instruction: Order the Conflict Stages evidence cycle for this review task before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Conflict Stages assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Merge conflict in policy.txt has base limit=2, main limit=6, and repair limit=7 plus retry tests. Inspect index stages, reconstruct intent, create a semantic result, and verify before continue.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Conflict Stages has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

hints: Name the Conflict Stages precondition or invariant that the review case must preserve.

Trace this concrete case before choosing: Merge conflict in policy.txt has base limit=2, main limit=6, and repair limit=7 plus retry tests. Inspect index stages, reconstruct intent, create a semantic result, and verify before continue.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: Ours always means the feature branch and theirs always means main.

options.text: Inspect repository boundary, config origin, current operation, worktree, index, refs, and graph
Preserve uncommitted work and a recovery ref, then state intended tree and topology
Preview and perform the least destructive simulated Git operation
Verify status, staged and range diffs, graph, tests, remote target, and recovery path

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write the review evidence note for Rerere Regression: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Merge conflict in policy.txt has base limit=2, main limit=2, and repair limit=3 plus retry tests. Inspect index stages, reconstruct intent, create a semantic result, and verify before continue.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Record or reuse conflict resolutions only after verifying context, tests, and changed-case behavior.
